summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job states this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent maintainer-review inventory unless already closed or requiring specific maintainer judgment; unhydrated tail refs are kept non-mutating with null live timestamps.
